mapper.select: SELECT R.report_id, U.nickname AS reporter_nickname, R.target_type, R.target_id, CASE WHEN R.target_type = 'POST' THEN P.title WHEN R.target_type = 'COMMENT' THEN C.content ELSE CONCAT(R.target_type, ' #', R.target_id) END AS target_summary, R.reason_code, R.status, R.created_at FROM reports R JOIN users U ON R.reporter_id = U.user_id LEFT JOIN community_posts P ON R.target_type = 'POST' AND R.target_id = P.post_id LEFT JOIN comments C ON R.target_type = 'COMMENT' AND R.target_id = C.comment_id ORDER BY R.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE reports SET status = #{status}, handled_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'RESOLVED' THEN NOW() ELSE handled_at END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE report_id = #{reportId}
